assertionResults.reason: Leads footer displayed Previous/Next buttons and rows-per-page selector with 25/50/100 options.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173 on Leads view.
Observe table footer controls and page indicator.

assertionResults.reason: Row count respected selected page size at 25, 50, and 100.
reproductionNotes: Set rows-per-page to 25, then 50, then 100.
Count rendered rows in tbody each time.

assertionResults.reason: Next/Previous navigation changed pages and returned to original first-row data when navigating back.
reproductionNotes: From page 1, click Next page to reach page 2.
Verify first row differs from page 1.
Click Previous page and verify first row matches original page 1 row.

rows.page1FirstRow: 1 281 Nw 103 St Miami, FL 33150 Underpaid Hyacinth Grant Le Roof 79 Mar 28, 2026 New
rows.page2FirstRow: 26 722 Ne 204Th Ln Miami, FL 33179 Repeat Uri Stauss Aronowitz Roof 77 Mar 26, 2026 New
rows.page1ReturnFirstRow: 1 281 Nw 103 St Miami, FL 33150 Underpaid Hyacinth Grant Le Roof 79 Mar 28, 2026 New

assertionResults.reason: Displayed page count matched ceil(total_leads / page_size).
reproductionNotes: With page size 25, read total leads and page indicator.
Compute ceil(13492 / 25) and compare against UI page count.

assertionResults.reason: Changing search text reset pagination to page 1.
reproductionNotes: Navigate to page 2.
Type 'river' in search input.
Verify page indicator resets to page 1.

assertionResults.reason: Changing status filter reset pagination to page 1.
reproductionNotes: Set page size to 100 and navigate to page 2.
Change Status from All to New.
Verify page indicator resets to page 1.

assertionResults.reason: Could not change insurer filter because dropdown contained only one option ('All insurers'), so no insurer change action was possible.
reproductionNotes: Inspect insurer dropdown options in Leads filters.
Observed optionCount=1 with only 'All insurers'.
No alternate insurer value available to trigger pagination reset behavior.

assertionResults.reason: Changing FEMA filter reset pagination to page 1.
reproductionNotes: Set page size to 50 and navigate to page 2.
Change FEMA filter from All to Tagged.
Verify page indicator resets to page 1.

assertionResults.reason: Changing sort order reset pagination to page 1.
reproductionNotes: Set page size to 50 and navigate to page 2.
Change sort from Newest first to Score (high→low).
Verify page indicator resets to page 1.

assertionResults.reason: Changing page size reset pagination to page 1.
reproductionNotes: On page 2, change rows-per-page from 25 to 50 (and later 50 to 100).
Verify page indicator resets to page 1 after each page-size change.

assertionResults.reason: No console errors or page errors were reported during the tested pagination/filter interactions.
reproductionNotes: Clear browser errors/console logs.
Run assigned pagination and filter interactions.
Check `agent-browser errors` and `agent-browser console` outputs.

evidence.network: agent-browser network requests -> No requests captured

frictions.description: agent-browser chained heredoc + command chaining intermittently produced `SyntaxError: Unexpected identifier 'session'` during eval chains.
frictions.resolution: Switched to shorter single-purpose commands (separate eval/snapshot/select/screenshot calls) and re-ran steps.

frictions.description: Element refs became stale after page-state changes causing temporary click failures.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran `agent-browser snapshot -i` before subsequent interactions to refresh refs.

blockers.description: Insurer dropdown did not expose any selectable insurer values beyond 'All insurers', preventing insurer-filter-change flow validation.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Repeatedly reset filters, refreshed refs, and re-inspected insurer select options; option count remained 1.

summary: Validated 11 assigned assertions: 10 passed, 1 blocked (VAL-DASH-037 due to no selectable insurer options).
